response.justification: Candidate is a senior/staff engineer with 15+ years of experience applying for an entry-level Junior Java Developer role — a severe seniority mismatch that creates high overqualification and retention risk. Java appears only briefly in older roles; the primary stack is TypeScript/Node.js/DLang. German is only Basic, which fails the German-client-facing requirement for the insurance sector. No insurance domain experience.
strengths: Deep polyglot engineering background with strong software craftsmanship (TDD, CI/CD, pairing)
Demonstrated agile methodology experience and workshop/teaching background
Some prior Java exposure (robotic arms, mobile orchestration at Altom)
concerns: Massive seniority mismatch — Staff/Senior engineer applying for entry-level role
German is only 'Basic' but role requires strong verbal/written German
Java is peripheral in stack; primary expertise is TypeScript and DLang, not Java

key_factors.factor: Strong engineering fundamentals and agile experience
